purpose: Premium F&B packaging hero (similar pedestal logic). Brand-led packaging showcase.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Premium F&B packaging photography of {packaging_descriptor} with branded logo and design visible, food item visible through packaging window or peeking from open container, warm directional lighting, neutral premium background, hyper-realistic packaging material and food detail, shot on 50mm at f/5.6, contemporary delivery-focused brand aesthetic, no text overlay, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Source code in research corpus: F05. Saudi adaptation guidance: For Saudi cloud kitchen brands. Packaging should reflect modern Saudi delivery culture (Jahez, Hungerstation, Mrsool aesthetic). Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per week cloud kitchen brands.
